title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM 21 (s), ILOCOS SUR, PARAGRAPH (e), SUBSECTION B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2339 / 52 OG No. 10, 4520 (August 31, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1544, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM 21 (s), ILOCOS SUR, PARAGRAPH (e), SUBSECTION B, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item 21(

s

), Ilocos Sur, paragraph (

e

), subsection B, section one of Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred twenty, is amended to read as follows:

"(s) Pudoc Barrio School

P1,000.00

"(s-1) Becques Home Economics

1,000.00

"(s-2) Libtong Barrio School

1,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
